daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Mild Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-29
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 is set to launch the Starlink Group 17-29 satellites, continuing the expansion of the Starlink constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for best viewing experience.

top_events.title: Long March 7 | Tianzhou-10
top_events.description: China's Long March 7 will launch the Tianzhou-10 cargo spacecraft to resupply the Tiangong Space Station.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast
top_events.description: Mild geomagnetic activity expected with Kp index peaking at 3.67, offering limited aurora viewing opportunities.
top_events.action: Check local conditions for possible sightings.
